title: Asking for Directions
content: While exploring a new city, Olivia realized she was completely lost. The streets looked similar, and her phone battery had almost died. She decided to ask a local resident for directions. The woman smiled kindly and explained how to reach the central square. She even pointed out a shortcut through a nearby park. Olivia followed the directions carefully and soon recognized familiar landmarks again. Before leaving, she thanked the woman for her help. The experience reminded Olivia that friendly people can often make traveling much easier.
